finding_results.notes: The sink-mat exchange now forces a self-generated consequence before the showcase interruption: Ben and Nita explicitly keep Leela at Mina's through Sunday and name a boundary against treating the relapse as reconciliation. The later Mina call carries that consequence forward once the alerts arrive.
finding_results.summary: Inserted a concrete pre-alert consequence of the relapse by extending Leela's stay at Mina's and forbidding the sex from masquerading as a restored marriage.

summary: Revised the chapter 15 morning-after scene so the relapse changes household boundaries before the showcase emails interrupt.
